title: What Scripture actually says about humility (it's not weakness)
caption:
A man who thinks humility means making himself small has misread the Book.

The man Scripture describes isn't soft — he's submitted. Secure in who he is under God, free from the need to prove it. Jesus cleared the temple and washed feet in the same week. That's not a contradiction. That's the whole picture.

"Walk humbly with your God." — Micah 6:8. Not crawl. Not disappear. Walk.

Real humility doesn't look the way culture tells you it does. It looks like a man with enough security to serve without applause, to lead without demanding credit, to be corrected without breaking.

Save this for the man who thinks surrendering pride means surrendering himself.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #scripture #christianity #disciplemaking #masculinity
